plugins.name: cmo-core
plugins.description: General code architecture, code review, and git operations — universal coding-standards, testing-standards (tier model + two-level Jira traceability + parallelism), security review, code-review and project-analysis agents. feature-workflow skill auto-triggers on feature requests and orchestrates plan → implement → analyzer + reviewer in parallel → /pr.

plugins.name: cmo-frontend
plugins.description: Frontend skills for C-Mo: vue-conventions, react-conventions, bootstrap-scss, cmo-design-system (defers to in-package skill), ionic-capacitor, frontend-testing (defers to cmo-core/testing-standards). All enforce the no-business-logic-on-frontend rule and TanStack Query for server state.

plugins.name: cmo-dotnet
plugins.description: C# / .NET ≥ 8.0 conventions and testing skills (ASP.NET Core, EF Core, MediatR/CQRS, WebApplicationFactory, Testcontainers, xUnit). Reviewer agent and /dn-new-controller command are scaffolds.

plugins.name: cmo-firmware
plugins.description: Embedded firmware plugin (C/C++) — target-agnostic conventions, sensor-integration workflow, and host-side testing skills. Covers STM32 / ESP32 / nRF / RP2040 / AVR with CMake, PlatformIO, ESP-IDF, or Zephyr. Reviewer agent and /fw-build command are scaffolds.
